bio_summary: We offer services from A to Z with respect to procuring patent and industrial design protection in Canada, USA and abroad, that is, from preliminary patentability/originality assessment to grant. Additionally, we offer Freedom-to-Operate, Validity and Infringement Searches and Opinions.

We have a team of experienced patent agents, trademark agents and IP lawyers, with deep experience in biotech/lifesci, AI/compsci, medtech, mechanical, chemistry, cleantech, deeptech and fintech, and perform services including patent drafting, patent and trademark prosecution, IP strategy, searching (patentability, clearance, landscape), and legal support for establishing and maintaining IP rights, including preparation and analysis of licensees and agreements.
Idea identification and documentation, Patent landscape analysis, Patent Audit, Idea Audit, Patentability Searching, Freedom to operate searches, and the like.
Introductory IP education; Validity and infringement opinions; Overview of IP Landscape; Drafting & filing in all IP fields; Licencing in all IP fields; Enforcement and defence of IP rights.
Patent, trademark, industrial design prosecution and enforcement, Business and commercial law and advices, Licensing agreements.

Dr. Barden advises startup pharmaceutical, medtech, and cleantech companies on IP strategy; internal disclosure and confidentiality best practices; patent drafting; international patent filing tactics; IP diligence with angels / venture capital; in-license negotiations with tech transfer; and IP out-licensing.

Dentons' Intellectual Property (IP) team can help protect your valuable IP assets. Our team provides expert strategic advice at each stage of the innovation lifecycle by identifying, protecting and exploiting IP rights.

IP strategy services including business consulting, market analysis, IP searches, IP intelligence, innovation and trend scouting, partner scouting, licensing support, chemical safety intelligence, technology alerting, IP prosecution services, patent drafting, IP docketing and administration.

Based in Ottawa, Canada, FIN IP Group is a leading global provider of IP valuation, licensing strategy, royalty rate development and analysis, addressable revenue research, IP training, and advanced IP strategy.

Our global intellectual property (IP) practice spans offices worldwide and works across key jurisdictions to provide exceptional IP advice across the full life cycle of your IP rights including advertising and marketing, entertainment and sports, regulatory, patents, trademarks, copyright, design rights and related litigation and transactional work.

We will help with your legal requirements as you proceed through your startup journey. Services we offer include: Incorporation & Registration; Shareholder Agreement; Assignment of IP; Issuance of Shares; Stock Options Plan, and more.

We build strong patent portfolios for high tech companies, obtain trademarks and industrial designs, develop all aspects of IP strategy including patent infringement avoidance strategy, provide IP education, conduct IP mining sessions, comprehensive searches, competitive intelligence, IP audits, provide patent valuation, licensing and litigation support.

Kerr & Nadeau is an intellectual property law firm with offices in Halifax and Ottawa, providing technology-related legal services, and patent and trademark agency services, including the preparation, filing and prosecution of patent and trademark applications.

We offer a full range of advice relating to intellectual property in all its forms, including: conducting technology assessment, conducting searches, conducting IP audits, developing IP strategies, securing IP rights, advising on internal policies, drafting agreements, and more.
LinkIP Intellectual Property Consultancy is a Canadian-registered IP consulting firm located in Ontario. We specialize in providing strategic and legal support to protecting your IP rights in China.
General Counsel and corporate governance support, together with global IP strategy, regarding filing strategy, as well as IP strategy in corporate documents and fundraising.
IP Awareness; Developing IP Strategies; Implementing IP Strategies; Professional Services; Bilingual Services.

Mintz creates breakthrough IP strategies that help our clients solve problems and forge ahead. Our areas of service include: IP strategy and IP governance consulting, development and management of comprehensive portfolio strategies, patent drafting and prosecution, and more.
Project management of innovation and IP related projects. Provision of IP roadmaps and strategies for startups, including business mentoring, if required.

IP Strategy & Consultation, IP Analytics, Protect & Register IP Rights, IP Assignments, Licenses & Other Agreements, Trade Secrets & Confidential Information, IP Audits & Management, IP Education & Training.

IP education and awareness in all areas of IP including patents, designs, trademarks, copyright, confidential information; IP strategy review, planning, and development in all areas of IP; IP strategy execution and implementation.
IP Awareness/IP training, IP Strategy development, IP Strategy implementation. Global IP team includes more than 250 lawyers, patent attorneys and trademark agents working across 50+ countries.

Ovodenovo assists Canadian innovative companies and independent inventors to obtain patent protection and develop strategies to protect their most valuable innovations. We involve our clients at every step and become experts in their tech.

Osler's intellectual group can provide the full range of IP services to start-ups including: general advice regarding patents, ensuring IP rights are owned by the appropriate entity, providing opinions on proposed trademarks, preparing and filing applications, and ongoing prosecution and portfolio management.

We are a Canadian intellectual property law firm offering comprehensive IP solutions. Our services include conducting patent and trademark searches, providing opinions on patentability, trademark registrability, and freedom to operate.
Our focus is identifying and protecting a startup's IP to build investor confidence in its business. IP Training, IP Strategy Creation, IP Filings, IP Agreements, Advice on IP Disputes.
IP identification, assessment, preparation and securement from initial stages to searching, drafting and prosecution (patents and industrial designs).

Portfolio helps you unlock the value of your innovation. We offer comprehensive market, technology, and IP assessments — including patentability and freedom-to-operate searches — to develop actionable IP strategies fully aligned with your business goals and scale.
QipWorks is a full-service IP strategic advisory firm that partners with technology companies, innovators, and investors to build, manage and utilize IP portfolios.

Contract Drafting including employment/contractor related IP, commercial agreements with customers and partners, intra-company corporate structuring, Canadian & US trademark applications, and general IP legal advisory services.

We help startups build a strong IP portfolio and provide services in the following areas: IP Education and awareness, IP Audits, IP Strategy development and implementation, IP Landscaping, IP Portfolio Valuation.
We can provide a full range of intellectual property services and access to our full breadth and depth of expertise across all technical areas and industries.

Stewart McKelvey is one of Atlantic Canada's largest full-service law firms, providing comprehensive intellectual property legal services across Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, and Newfoundland and Labrador.

IP Education, IP awareness webinars, IP strategy review and design, IP strategy implementation, IP analytics, Virtual IP department, Patent drafting and prosecution, Trademark preparation and prosecution.

At THIP we advise clients on IP and brand strategy to help clients build, protect, and strengthen their commercial identity. We offer comprehensive trademark services, including clearance searches, filing, prosecution, and registration.
IP Management and Strategy, IP portfolio Management, Patent Search and Analysis, Patent Drafting and Filing, Process development to protect all forms of intangible assets.

I work with early-stage start-ups as it is never too soon to understand the ownership, protection, and exploitation of IP. I provide education, training, IP assessments, and early-stage IP strategies.
Build and Protect (Patent Prep, Trademarks Search); Manage and Monitor (Prior Art, Landscapes, Portfolio analysis); Harvest and Invest (Infringement analysis, Source Code review).
All IP and IP related legal work, every aspect of corporate and commercial legal work.

VanTek IP aims to provide you, the innovator, with practical IP advice based on your business objectives. We have an experienced and professional team to help you obtain your patents and trademarks at an affordable cost.
Williams Armstrong Law Practice offers a comprehensive suite of legal services designed to empower startups to thrive while safeguarding their business, creative, and innovative interests.
Witmart provides a comprehensive search and consultation session to businesses looking to file a trademark in Canada, or anywhere around the world.
